name: moveFile
description: Move a file to a new path. Automatically handles cross-device moves by copying then deleting the original.
intent: move a file from one path to another path
whenToUse: The user supplies a source path and a destination path for a single file.
The intent is to change the file's location, not its contents.
Both paths refer to files (not directories).
whenNotToUse: The user wants only the file renamed in place. Use renameFile instead.
The user is referring to a directory hierarchy. Use moveDirectory instead.
The user wants to read, list, or discover the file. Use readFile / listDirectory / glob instead.

oldPath.description: Current relative path of the file to move

newPath.description: Destination relative path for the file
